South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2.2% YoY, Beating Prior Months but Missing 2.4% Forecasts | NO | MED confidence**

South Korea's annual CPI inflation increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, per Statistics Korea data reported across sources, remaining near the Bank of Korea's 2% target amid Middle East-driven energy volatility.[1][3] This reading, released aroun

signals.headline: Iran-Israel/US Conflict End Markets Gain Traction | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Iran-Israel/US Conflict End Markets Gain Traction | NO | MED confidence**  
Markets like "Iran x Israel/US conflict ends by...?" at 97% and "Trump announces US x Iran ceasefire broken by...?" at 11% indicate trader interest in geopolitical resolutions, potentially moving odds with confirmations, though no recent announcements or resolutions are confirmed.[1]
